cross_scene_arcs.title: From Isolation to Belonging
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Finn begins as a traumatized, isolated fugitive believing Poe dead, gradually regains connection through alliance with Rey and Han, and ultimately achieves recognition and belonging upon reuniting with Poe.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: alone, scared, and directionless after losing Poe
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: recognized as a hero and accepted by Poe and the Resistance

cross_scene_arcs.title: Evolving Bond with Rey
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Finn and Rey's relationship develops from tense cooperation during escape, through growing trust and mutual recognition, to a protective bond confirmed by Finn's willingness to fight for her and Rey's emotional response to his actions.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: tense dynamic with Rey resisting his protective gestures
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Rey emotionally moved by Finn's role in her rescue; Finn fights Kylo Ren to protect her

cross_scene_arcs.title: Confronting Fear and Identity
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Finn struggles with internal conflict stemming from fear of the First Order, deception about his past, and a desire to flee, which surfaces in moments of pressure and undermines trust with Han.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: traumatized by loss and uncertain of his role
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: admits his lack of technical knowledge and true motive is personal, not strategic
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: fear of exposure and inability to fully commit to the fight

cross_scene_arcs.title: Becoming a Fighter
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Finn transitions from evading combat to active participation, first by firing the Falcon's guns, then enduring capture, and finally confronting Kylo Ren in defense of Rey despite overwhelming odds.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: struggling to operate weapons under pressure
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: engages Kylo Ren in lightsaber combat, lands a hit, and is critically injured
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: survival after sustaining a severe injury in battle

cross_scene_arcs.title: From Reluctant Smuggler to Committed Ally
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Han transitions from a self-interested smuggler avoiding past debts to an active participant in the Resistance mission, ultimately committing to help deliver BB-8 and disable Starkiller Base's shields.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: focused on recovering his ship and avoiding entanglement
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: leading a team on a high-risk mission to support the Resistance
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: no clear method to disable the shields at Starkiller Base

cross_scene_arcs.title: Fatherhood and the Fall of Ben Solo
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Han confronts the emotional truth of his son Ben's fall to the dark side, shifts from denial to a willingness to intervene, and makes a final attempt to reach him as Kylo Ren.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: avoiding the pain of his son's disappearance and transformation
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: emotionally exposed and directly confronting Kylo Ren as Ben
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: whether Kylo Ren can be redeemed or if Han's appeal will have any effect

cross_scene_arcs.title: Building Trust with Rey and Finn
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Han evolves from initial skepticism to relying on Rey and Finn in critical moments, offering Rey a place on his crew and protecting Finn in combat, establishing mutual trust.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: wary of Rey and Finn, viewing them as thieves and unknowns
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: protective of both and treating them as trusted allies
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Rey's obligation to return to Jakku remains unfulfilled and unresolved

cross_scene_arcs.title: Leadership Under Pressure
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Han repeatedly assumes command in high-stakes situations, directing team actions during escapes and combat, despite growing doubts about the mission and his companions' preparedness.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: losing control during a failed negotiation with criminal gangs
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: reasserting authority during the Starkiller Base mission and escape
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: how to escape Starkiller Base before reinforcements arrive

cross_scene_arcs.title: From Isolation to Relational Commitment
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Rey transitions from solitary survival on Jakku to forming meaningful bonds with BB-8, Finn, and Chewbacca, culminating in emotional investment and resilience through loss.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: lives in isolation on Jakku, emotionally detached
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: emotionally connected, motivated by care for others despite personal loss
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: emotional need for connection remains partially unmet; Finn's survival uncertain

cross_scene_arcs.title: Moral Conviction Under Pressure
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Rey consistently prioritizes protecting BB-8 and doing what is right over personal gain or safety, even when facing hunger, threats, or betrayal.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: faced with hunger and tempted by Unkar's offer
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: actively defends BB-8 and resists First Order attack
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: mission success still uncertain; BB-8's safety not guaranteed

cross_scene_arcs.title: Emergence of Agency and Combat Competence
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Rey evolves from a scavenger with survival skills to an active combatant and pilot, demonstrating increasing technical and tactical capability under pressure.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: competent pilot, improviser, and combatant using the Force
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: still lacks full control or understanding of her abilities

cross_scene_arcs.title: Confrontation with Kylo Ren and Force Awakening
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Rey's first direct confrontation with Kylo Ren triggers her latent Force abilities, leading to combat engagement and emotional stakes tied to Finn's survival.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: engaged in combat with Kylo Ren using Luke's lightsaber
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: source and limits of her Force ability remain unknown

cross_scene_arcs.title: Tension Between Duty and Belonging
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Rey struggles with her commitment to return to Jakku and wait for her family, even as opportunities for belonging and purpose arise with Han, Chewie, and Finn.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: bound to Jakku by hope of family return
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: abandons return plan after emotional loss and mission escalation
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: conflict between past loyalty and future identity remains unresolved
